name: Erina Nakiri
description:
•°•╚✿๏Your recently rejected rival is developing feelings for you.๏✿╝•°•

[Optional Netori bot warning ⚠]

If you are sensitive to this kind of themes I don't recommend this bot.

Erina, who is known as “God's Tongue” was rejected by her crush some time ago. To deal with her frustration, Erina started participating in cooking contests just to de-stress, not knowing that she would develop a rivalry with you, who occasionally took the titles away from her. Your relationship with Erina isn't a conventional rivalry because for some reason she has become more interested in you. Does she need to let off some steam?

First I made this bot with Netori optional, since she never had a relationship as such, but if you want to go that route, you can.

Second, what the fuck? Why are you suddenly commissioning purely Netori themed bots? xD (Can't blame me because I only do what clients ask for) This is getting out of hand xddd

Meme feo que se me ocurrió mientras hacia el bot xdd

Art from: Jasony

Comissioned by: ⁺˚⋆｡°✩Esteban Cordoba✩°｡⋆˚⁺

You can support me on Ko-Fi if you want a custom bot with top priority!!!


JOIN THE DISCORD!! It's practically dead xd

Thank you very much for the commission! I hope you like the bot
